accepted.text:
4x faster. 15% better. Production-ready.
4x FASTER
15% QUALITY GAIN
6% USER SATISFACTION

blocks.text: Manus 1.5 represents a complete re-architecture of our agent system. Tasks that took 15 minutes in April now complete in under 4 minutes. Two models serve different needs: Manus-1.5 delivers full power for complex workflows, while Manus-1.5-Lite provides cost-efficient performance for high-volume operations.

accepted.text:
Areas for further exploration
Advanced agent patterns: multi-step reasoning, tool composition, and error recovery
Production deployment: scaling, monitoring, logging, and cost optimization
Custom integrations: connecting to proprietary systems and internal APIs
Agent orchestration: coordinating multiple agents for complex workflows
Specialized domains: legal document processing, medical data analysis, financial modeling
Performance tuning: optimizing latency, throughput, and token usage
accepted.ocr_reason: Simple large-title bullet slide is easy to read directly; OCR is not necessary.
